summary: Completed testing of iteration 23 features: 1) Set-password creates account for new Heartbeat users - PASS, 2) Licensee simulation dialog with dummy/specific user selection - PASS, 3) Withdrawal immediately deducts from balance - PASS, 4) Initial balance recorded as deposit transaction - PASS. Fixed a bug where withdrawal dialog showed $0 available balance instead of license.current_amount.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features tested and working: 1) Set-password endpoint creates new account for verified Heartbeat email (hello@hyperdrivemg.co) - tested via API, 2) Licensee simulation dialog appears when clicking Honorary/Extended Licensee View in sidebar - has Demo Mode and specific licensee selection options, 3) Withdrawal immediately deducts from license.current_amount (tested: $10,000 -> $9,900 after $100 withdrawal), 4) License creation records initial balance as deposit transaction with is_initial_balance: true. Fixed bug: LicenseeAccountPage.jsx was using profitAPI.getSummary() for balance instead of license.current_amount - now correctly shows license balance in withdrawal dialog.

features_tested.set_password_creates_account: PASS - hello@hyperdrivemg.co account created via set-password endpoint
features_tested.login_with_new_account: PASS - Can login with newly created account
features_tested.licensee_simulation_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with Demo Mode and specific licensee options
features_tested.deposit_pending_no_balance_change: PASS - Deposit submission does not change balance until admin marks complete
features_tested.initial_balance_as_deposit: PASS - License creation records initial balance as deposit transaction

withdrawal_dialog_balance.issue: Withdrawal dialog showed 'Available Balance: $0' instead of actual license balance
withdrawal_dialog_balance.fix: Changed to use license.current_amount for licensees instead of profitAPI.getSummary()
